findings.evidence: Existing API: `code/TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/DifferentialSupportCardinality.lean:122: theorem fullyBlockedDifferential_eq_zero_of_le_one (G : GridDiagram n) (hn : n ≤ 1) : G.fullyBlockedDifferential = 0`; new duplicate-special-case at `DifferentialSquareSupport.lean:182`.
findings.fix: Remove this lemma, or avoid adding square-specific small-grid API unless it is required by a downstream theorem not served by rewriting with the existing zero-differential lemma.
findings.issue: `fullyBlockedDifferential_sq_eq_zero_of_le_one` is only a special case of the existing `fullyBlockedDifferential_eq_zero_of_le_one`, which already states `G.fullyBlockedDifferential = 0` for `n ≤ 1`.

findings.evidence: Existing API: `code/TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/DifferentialSupportCardinality.lean:140: theorem fullyBlockedDifferential_eq_zero_of_zero (G : GridDiagram 0) : G.fullyBlockedDifferential = 0`; new duplicate-special-case at `DifferentialSquareSupport.lean:191`.
findings.fix: Remove this specialization with the previous lemma; callers can use `fullyBlockedDifferential_eq_zero_of_zero` or the `n ≤ 1` version and then simplify the composition.
findings.issue: `fullyBlockedDifferential_sq_eq_zero_of_zero` is the size-0 specialization of the same already-existing stronger zero-differential API.

summary: The two-step support API appears to reuse the existing one-step support/cardinality lemmas, but the small-grid square-zero lemmas duplicate an existing stronger zero-differential API.
